title: 10 best herbal teas for allergies
intro_desc: Herbal teas for allergies are natural remedies that help alleviate symptoms of allergies by soothing the immune system and reducing inflammation. The best herbal teas for allergies include Echinacea purpurea, Ginkgo biloba, Eucalyptus globulus, Quercus robur, Sambucus nigra, Urtica dioica, Matricaria chamomilla, Thymus serpyllum, Ziziphus jujuba, and Taraxacum officinale. If left untreated, allergies can severely impact daily life, causing persistent congestion, itchy eyes, and skin rashes, leading to discomfort, fatigue, and even missed work or social events.
